g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the aws_availability_zones data source?')
sendPrompt('What does the Internet Gateway do?')
sendPrompt('How are public subnets created with count?')
sendPrompt('How are private subnets created with count?')
sendPrompt('What does the public route table contain?')
sendPrompt('Why does each private subnet get its own route table?')
sendPrompt('What does the aws_route resource do?')
sendPrompt('How does each private subnet get associated with its own route table?')
sendPrompt('What does the NAT Gateway lesson cover?')
g.text: adds 0.0.0.0/0 → nat to private route tables
